response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman and Staff Engineer, but lacks the executive leadership background required for this CTO role. The position mandates scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people, managing board-level communications, and deep domain expertise in both fintech infrastructure and production-grade multi-agent AI systems, none of which are demonstrated in his resume.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including handling high-throughput microservices at scale.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong advocate for engineering quality, demonstrated by organizing refactoring dojos, TDD workshops, and creating testing libraries.
concerns: Lacks executive engineering leadership experience; no track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or managing managers.
Insufficient production experience with stateful, multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes or regulated environments.
Missing required domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital management, real-time credit risk, and trade decisioning.
